design: v0.2 baseline PANEL: 8 sub-agents (one per issue), each runs 6 lenses inline on sonnet-4.6, no compression
method_note: Cost is a SIZE-BASED ESTIMATE: agent reasoned through the triage task, sized its dispatches against $3/$15 sonnet rates. Verdicts were produced by actual reasoning. Token counts are MODELED, not harness-reported.
